results.name: India
results.key_finding: ONLY SCORED MOVEMENT + ONLY BAND CROSSING this cycle. HRW World Report 2026 + Polis Project document a government-directed refoulement-and-expulsion regime: 1,500+ expelled to Bangladesh May-June without due process (incl. Indian citizens); 192 UNHCR Rohingya refouled; 40 Rohingya beaten and tossed into the sea from a navy vessel; 10,000+ Gujarat demolitions defying the Supreme Court's Nov 2024 ruling; May 2 SOP removed bilateral notification; Union Home Ministry ordered 30-day STF deportations. ACTIVE-STATE-PERPETRATION-REWEIGHT (downgrade concentrated EQU/EMP/ACC/INT). Held at 15.6 (NOT floor) because functioning courts (Calcutta HC return order) demonstrably reverse some acts. Developing 22.7 -> Critical 15.6. Flagged for human review.

results.name: Iran
results.key_finding: Scale-floor confirm at 2.5. SCALE-FLOOR-RULING re-affirmed with new dated act: 2 Kurdish political prisoners (Maleki, Mohammadinia) secretly executed June 1; 2 more executed over alleged mosque attack; 600+ executions YTD 2026. Single dominant extremity; does not meet multi-category 0.0 threshold.

results.name: Uganda
results.key_finding: Natural-disaster-overlay confirm at 20.3. Ebola Bundibugyo reached Kampala (15 cases, 1 death; WHO PHEIC May 17) but documented state posture is COOPERATION (surveillance, isolation facilities, National EMT, mobile lab, WHO/CDC coordination), not obstruction. Exogenous shock revealing priced incapacity; AHA concern already in baseline. No double-count. Rotation-state internal 15.3 differs; published 20.3 authoritative.

results.name: South Sudan
results.key_finding: Floor confirmation at 0.0. IPC Phase 5 escalation (73,300 in Catastrophe, +160%; 7.8M / 56% in Phase 3+) is conflict-driven (SAF/SPLM-IO cutting communities off from food/markets; HRW May 6 'civilians starving in conflict areas') with constrained humanitarian access -> active-perpetration floor, NOT pure natural-disaster overlay. Already at absolute 0.0; escalation reinforces but cannot move lower.

results.name: Palestine
results.key_finding: Confirm at 25.0. OCHA April 23 catastrophic conditions (77% acute food insecurity; reconstruction <$1B of $71.4B; 84% economic contraction) are attributable to the occupying power's aid restrictions, scored against Israel (0.0 floor), not the PA -- non-double-count. Recovery National Committee framework established but unverified for effect. No PA-attributable scorable act.

results.name: Oracle
results.key_finding: Boundary confirm at 20.6 (0.6pt above Critical). WARN final-phase sign-or-forfeit (June 1, ~30,000 workers, completing June 15) is materialization of an already-priced layoff; Oracle declined to renegotiate severance (consistent with EMP 1.2). Remote-reclassification WARN-avoidance theory + NJ state WARN matter remain FILED-BUT-UNADJUDICATED -> not yet scorable.

results.name: CVS Health
results.key_finding: Confirm at 25.6. FILED-BUT-UNADJUDICATED-LITIGATION re-affirmed: 340B $250M diversion suit (May 21; Mount Sinai/U Kansas/U Michigan) + Tennessee PBM-reform challenge reinforce, not reveal un-priced harm on, the near-floor ACC 1.75 / EQU 1.75 profile. Not independently scorable pre-adjudication.

results.name: UnitedHealth Group
results.key_finding: Mixed-signal confirm at 10.2. Negative: DOJ criminal+civil MA-billing probe (disclosed July 2025, priced); AI claim-denial class action in discovery; Senate 'aggressive MA gaming' finding. Positive: prior-auth reductions (30% general, ~two-thirds pediatric; ~50-insurer June 2026 pledge) but ANNOUNCED/IN-PROGRESS, not verified for effect -> not yet creditable as upgrade. Net neutral against near-floor baseline.

results.name: Bolivia
results.key_finding: Carry-forward at 28.4. Week-5+ strike (89 blockade points; 7 dead, 23 wounded, 321 arrested; May 27 military-deployment law) is the SAME crisis window scored 2026-05-28 and re-confirmed 2026-05-31. Reassess-on-resolution trigger not fired. No double-count.

results.name: Israel
results.key_finding: Floor confirmation at 0.0. AUTHORIZED-RESUMPTION-WITH-SYSTEMATIC-DENIAL re-affirmed (HRW May 19: trucks 4,200->590/week, 2 crossings, 37 INGOs banned, reconstruction <$1B of $71.4B). Ceasefire is not an improvement signal.

results.name: Hungary
results.key_finding: Confirm at 50.2 (the 05-30 INT-cluster proposal 50.0->50.2 was APPLIED 06-01 and is now the published baseline). CONSTITUTIONAL-AMENDMENT-AS-EXECUTIVE-REMOVAL re-affirmed: June 1 formal amendment launch (general framework law, Venice Commission consulted) is materialization of the already-resolved boundary-watch. No new scorable act; no duplicate proposal.

results.name: Nigeria
results.key_finding: Natural-disaster-overlay confirm at 21.9. Lean-season escalation (52.8M food insecure across W/C Africa; Borno 15,000 at catastrophic risk first time in ~a decade) is a seasonal/conflict-driven shock revealing priced incapacity; no documented state obstruction in window. EQU/EMP/SYS baseline already reflects chronic insecurity. No double-count.

results.name: Democratic Republic of C
results.key_finding: Near-floor confirm at 2.3. NATURAL-DISASTER-OVERLAY-NON-DOUBLE-COUNT re-affirmed: Ebola Bundibugyo escalating (DRC 321 cases/48 deaths up from 282/42; spread to Uganda incl. Kampala; WHO PHEIC; no vaccine) is an exogenous shock revealing priced incapacity, no documented state obstruction. Disambiguation re-confirmed (composite-2.3 entity, NOT Republic of Congo).

results.name: Sudan
results.key_finding: Floor confirmation at 0.0. June lean season: 19.5M crisis food insecure, 135,000 IPC Phase 5; 825,000 children projected SAM; plan 20% funded; famine confirmed in Al Fasher and Kadugli, 20 more areas at risk. Conflict-driven siege/starvation; war in third year. Floor sustained.

results.name: Anthropic
results.key_finding: Confirm at 59.1. Two in-progress signals offset: POSITIVE refusal of DoD 'all lawful purpose' terms (DC Circuit divided at May 2026 oral arguments, no ruling -> not yet creditable as I1 upgrade) vs NEGATIVE RSP v3.0 (Feb 24) dropping the flagship pre-commitment pledge (already within INT 3.2). Net-neutral under MILITARY-AI-BY-CONTRACT-GOVERNANCE (not operationalized).

results.name: Cabo Verde
results.key_finding: Rotation confirm at 62.5 (no news event; last_assessed was null). Stable Established profile; EQU 3.0 single laggard. Reconstruction exact; no math-hygiene flag. Rotation-state internal 65.5 differs; published 62.5 authoritative.

results.name: Cook Islands
results.key_finding: Rotation confirm at 50.0 (no news event; last_assessed was null). Stable Functional profile; EQU 2.5 laggard. Reconstruction exact; no math-hygiene flag.

results.name: Cyprus
results.key_finding: Rotation confirm at 50.0 (no news event; last_assessed was null). Stable Functional profile; EQU 2.5 laggard (division, migration/asylum pressures). Reconstruction exact; no math-hygiene flag.

results.name: São Tomé and Príncipe
results.key_finding: Rotation confirm at 48.4 (no news event; last_assessed was null). Stable Functional profile; EQU 2.5 laggard. Reconstruction exact; no math-hygiene flag. Slug-duplication data-hygiene note logged (s-o-tom-and-pr-ncipe rank 60 vs sao-tome-and-principe rank 65).

results.name: Nepal
results.key_finding: Rotation confirm at 48.4 (no news event; last_assessed was null). Stable Functional profile; EQU 2.5 laggard. Reconstruction exact; no math-hygiene flag.

scored_movements.note: Active-state-perpetration reweight (HRW World Report 2026 + Polis Project: government-directed refoulement-and-expulsion regime). Held above the 0.0 floor and above Burkina Faso (6.3) because functioning courts demonstrably contest and reverse some acts. ONLY band crossing this cycle.

band_crossings.outcome: change-proposal written (status pending); flagged for human review given band crossing

boundary_cases.outcome: carry-forward; any adverse WARN-avoidance/NJ-WARN adjudication would likely push into Critical

data_hygiene_flags.note: Two near-duplicate rotation-state keys exist for the same country: 's-o-tom-and-pr-ncipe' (published 'São Tomé and Príncipe', rank 60, composite 48.4) and 'sao-tome-and-principe' (published 'Sao Tome and Principe', rank 65, composite 48.4). Assessed under the accented scanner/index slug (rank 60). Recommend de-duplication in a future data-hygiene pass.

Rotation-state internal composite for Uganda (15.3) differs from the published index 20.3 (rank 150). Per methodology the published index value is authoritative; assessment and any future proposal cite 20.3.
Rotation-state internal composite (65.5) differs from published index 62.5 (rank 26). Published value authoritative.
Disambiguation re-confirmed: composite-2.3 entity (rank 181, 'Democratic Republic of C'), NOT Republic of Congo. Ebola evidence applied to the correct baseline.

methodology_rulings.ruling: Ruling established 2026-05-31 (Burkina Faso) extended to India. Where a corroborated independent finding (HRW World Report 2026, Tier-5; Polis Project deportation-regime investigation) documents a government-DIRECTED pattern of deliberate targeting (refoulement of UNHCR-registered refugees; expulsion of citizens; navy-vessel sea endangerment; executive defiance of a Supreme Court ruling) that the published baseline did not reflect, reweight toward — but not necessarily to — the Critical floor. Scored to 15.6, NOT 0.0, because functioning democratic institutions (Calcutta High Court return order; independent judiciary; opposition states) demonstrably contest and reverse some acts. This places India above the sole-perpetrator/uncontested floor (Myanmar/Sudan, 0.0) and above the multi-sided active-perpetration case (Burkina Faso, 6.3). Downgrade concentrated in EQU/EMP/ACC/INT. BAND CROSSING (Developing->Critical).

Re-affirmed at floor-adjacent 2.5. New dated act (June 1 secret execution of 2 Kurdish political prisoners; 2 more executed; 600+ YTD) reinforces a single dominant extremity that does not meet the multi-category absolute-0.0 threshold.

Re-affirmed. Exogenous/seasonal shocks (Uganda+DRC Ebola Bundibugyo; Nigeria/West-Africa lean season) reveal already-priced state-response incapacity rather than introducing a new scorable state act, absent documented deliberate state obstruction. Uganda's documented cooperation with WHO/CDC (surveillance, isolation facilities, National EMT, mobile lab) confirms incapacity-not-perpetration. Distinct from the active-perpetration floor.

Distinguished from the natural-disaster overlay. Where IPC Phase 5 escalation is substantially driven by active conflict cutting communities off from food/markets with state-attributable constrained humanitarian access (South Sudan SAF/SPLM-IO; Sudan SAF/RSF siege), the conduct sustains the active-perpetration 0.0 floor. An entity already at the absolute floor cannot move lower; escalation reinforces the floor.

Re-affirmed and applied across three corporates. Newly-filed/disclosed but pre-adjudication matters (CVS 340B $250M diversion suit + TN PBM challenge; Oracle remote-reclassification WARN-avoidance theory + NJ WARN; UnitedHealth DOJ MA-billing probe disclosed July 2025 + AI claim-denial class action in discovery) reinforce already near-floor profiles and are not independently scorable as downgrades. Reassess on adjudication/settlement.

UnitedHealthcare's prior-authorization reductions (30% general, ~two-thirds pediatric; ~50-insurer June 2026 pledge) are a genuine ACT/EQU-relevant access-improvement signal but are ANNOUNCED/IN-PROGRESS, not yet verified for delivered effect. Credit requires demonstrated protective effect (symmetric with the Haiti incoming-capacity standard). Not yet creditable as an upgrade against a near-floor baseline anchored by the structural claim-denial pattern and the DOJ probe. Net-neutral with the priced negatives. Reassess on verified outcomes.

Re-affirmed NOT operationalized. Anthropic's refusal of DoD 'all lawful purpose' terms (DC Circuit divided, no ruling) is an in-progress positive consistency-under-pressure signal not yet creditable; RSP v3.0 dropping the pre-commitment pledge is a candidate negative already within INT 3.2. Net-neutral; no dimension move.

The June 1 formal amendment launch (general framework law; Venice Commission consulted; Sulyok refused to resign) is the materialization of the boundary-watch resolved 2026-05-30, whose INT-cluster proposal (50.0->50.2) was applied 2026-06-01 and is now the published baseline. No new scorable act; no duplicate proposal. Candidate remains not operationalized into a standing rule.
Re-affirmed. HRW May 19 (trucks 4,200->590/week; 2 crossings; 37 INGOs banned; reconstruction <$1B of $71.4B) reinforces the 0.0 floor; ceasefire is not an improvement signal.

Re-affirmed. The catastrophic Gaza humanitarian conditions are attributable to the occupying power's aid restrictions and are scored against Israel (0.0 floor), not against the Palestinian Authority entity. No PA-attributable scorable act this cycle.

framing_corrections.correction: The HRW World Report 2026 refoulement-and-expulsion findings (and underlying 2025 deportation-regime documentation, including the navy-vessel sea incident and the Union Home Ministry STF directive) were not reflected in the published uniform-~1.9 baseline (22.7). Reweighted this cycle as active-state-perpetration evidence (downgrade to 15.6, Developing->Critical). The dated May-June scale-up (national STF directive; continued pushbacks) anchors the cycle's reweight.

top_3_most_consequential_findings.finding: Only scored movement and only band crossing this cycle. HRW World Report 2026 + Polis Project document a government-directed regime of refoulement and unlawful expulsion targeting Bengali Muslims and Rohingya: 1,500+ expelled to Bangladesh without due process (including Indian citizens, e.g. a pregnant woman the Calcutta HC ordered returned); 192 UNHCR-registered Rohingya refouled; 40 Rohingya beaten and tossed into the sea from a navy vessel; 10,000+ Gujarat demolitions defying the Supreme Court; May 2 SOP removing bilateral notification; Union Home Ministry 30-day STF deportation directive. ACTIVE-STATE-PERPETRATION-REWEIGHT to 15.6, held above the floor (functioning courts reverse some acts). Developing->Critical; flagged for human review.

Floor confirmation at 0.0 with a CONFLICT-DRIVEN-FAMINE-AT-FLOOR ruling distinguishing it from the natural-disaster overlay. IPC Phase 5 Catastrophe surged to 73,300 (+160%); 7.8M (56%) in Phase 3+; HRW May 6 documents civilians starving in conflict areas with constrained humanitarian access driven by escalating SAF/SPLM-IO fighting. Already at the absolute floor; escalation reinforces but cannot move it lower.

Mixed-signal confirm at 10.2 introducing the ANNOUNCED-NOT-VERIFIED-IMPROVEMENT ruling: UnitedHealthcare's prior-auth reductions (30% general, ~two-thirds pediatric; ~50-insurer June 2026 pledge) are a real access-improvement signal but are not yet verified for delivered effect and so are not creditable as an upgrade against a near-floor baseline anchored by the (priced) DOJ MA-billing probe and the AI claim-denial class action. Net-neutral. Reassess on verified outcomes or DOJ adjudication.

palestine (verified PA Recovery National Committee delivery; any PA-attributable governance failure/improvement)

cvs-health (adjudication/settlement of the 340B $250M diversion suit or the Tennessee FAIR Rx challenge)
unitedhealth-group (DOJ MA-billing adjudication/settlement; AI claim-denial class-action ruling; VERIFIED delivery of prior-auth reductions -> potential ACT/EQU upgrade)

validator_notes: validate-indexes.mjs exit 0 (0 errors, 129 pre-existing warnings, none among the 20 assessed entities). All 20 assessed baselines reconstruct exactly to stored published values via computeCompositeFromDimensions; no math-hygiene flags this cycle.

India published 22.7 vs simple canonical reconstruct of its OWN published dimensions = 23.1 (diff 0.4, within the 0.5 tolerance) -> NOT a math-hygiene flag (the proposed downgrade is a substantive reweight, not a reconciliation).
One band crossing this cycle: India (Developing 22.7 -> Critical 15.6); change-proposal written status pending, flagged for human review.
One boundary case: Oracle (20.6, 0.6pt above Critical) -- carry-forward, no proposal.
Hungary now published at 50.2 (the 2026-05-30 INT-cluster proposal was applied 2026-06-01); confirmed, no duplicate.
DRC disambiguation re-confirmed (composite-2.3 entity, not Republic of Congo). São Tomé slug-duplication data-hygiene note logged.
Uganda/Cabo Verde rotation-state internal composites (15.3 / 65.5) differ from published (20.3 / 62.5); published values authoritative per methodology.
No change-proposals other than the 2026-06-01 India proposal were created or modified; existing backlog left as-is.
methodology_version_signal: v1.2 sustained. New this cycle: CONFLICT-DRIVEN-FAMINE-AT-FLOOR (new ruling distinguishing conflict-driven IPC Phase 5 from the natural-disaster overlay; south-sudan/sudan), ANNOUNCED-NOT-VERIFIED-IMPROVEMENT (new ruling; unitedhealth-group), OCCUPATION-ATTRIBUTION-NON-DOUBLE-COUNT (new ruling; palestine). Extended: ACTIVE-STATE-PERPETRATION-REWEIGHT (established 2026-05-31 Burkina Faso) applied to India with the new 'functioning-institutions-hold-above-floor' refinement. Re-affirmed: SCALE-FLOOR-RULING (iran), NATURAL-DISASTER-OVERLAY-NON-DOUBLE-COUNT (uganda/DRC/nigeria), FILED-BUT-UNADJUDICATED-LITIGATION (cvs/oracle/unitedhealth), MILITARY-AI-BY-CONTRACT-GOVERNANCE (anthropic), CONSTITUTIONAL-AMENDMENT-AS-EXECUTIVE-REMOVAL (hungary), AUTHORIZED-RESUMPTION-WITH-SYSTEMATIC-DENIAL (israel).
